channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-19138] The Lustre client's memory exhaustion issue caused vdbench service interruption.
item.description:
The Lustre client has experienced memory exhaustion (total memory 375Gi, used 373Gi), leading to an interruption of the vdbench service.

 

1 Memory Info:

[root@client213 ~]# free -h

total used free shared buff/cache available

Mem: 375Gi 373Gi 2.9Gi 2.0Mi 1.6Gi 2.3Gi

Swap: 0B 0B 0B

cat /proc/slabinfo
...
kmalloc-64        6148242931 6148243648     64   64    1 : tunables    0    0    0 : slabdata 96066307 96066307      0
...

 

 

2 Memory Content Printed via crash:

 

0xff387f301e333140:     0x6e69666e6f636e75      0x6a626f3a755f6465
0xff387f301e333150:     0x6e753a725f746365      0x5f64656c6562616c
0xff387f301e333160:     0x0cd2ec0030733a74      0x5a5a5a5a5a5a5a5a
0xff387f301e333170:     0x5a5a5a5a5a5a5a5a      0x5a5a5a5a5a5a5a5a

 

 

3 Logs(/var/log/message)

 

Jun 23 18:12:22 client213 kernel: obd_memory max: 35736380442, obd_memory current: 108007944
Jun 23 18:12:22 client213 kernel: java invoked oom-killer: gfp_mask=0x1100cca(GFP_HIGHUSER_MOVABLE), order=0, oom_score_adj=0
Jun 23 18:12:23 client213 kernel: CPU: 57 PID: 1111006 Comm: java Kdump: loaded Tainted: G           OE     5.15.131-17.cl9.x86_64 #1
Jun 23 18:12:23 client213 kernel: Hardware name: XFUSION CeaLustre 5318Y/BC13MBSBC, BIOS 1.10 07/06/2022
Jun 23 18:12:25 client213 kernel: Call Trace:
Jun 23 18:12:25 client213 kernel: <TASK>
Jun 23 18:12:25 client213 kernel: dump_stack_lvl+0x34/0x48

Jun 23 18:12:31 client213 kernel: Out of memory: Killed process 3065788 ((sd-pam)) total-vm:173572kB, anon-rss:6356kB, file-rss:0kB, shmem-rss:0kB, UID:0 pgtables:96kB oom_score_adj:100
Jun 23 18:13:01 client213 kernel: obd_memory max: 35736380442, obd_memory current: 109177019

{{}}
item.environment:
Lustre Client:
Operating System: CentOS 9.4(5.15.131-17.cl9.x86_64)
Lustre Version: 2.15.5
Service: Running vdbench

Lustre Server:
Operating System: Rocky Linux 8.10 (4.18.0-553.5.1.el8_lustre.x86_64)
Lustre Version: 2.15.5
item.summary: The Lustre client's memory exhaustion issue caused vdbench service interruption.

status.description: The issue is open and ready for the assignee to start work on it.

comments.comment:
1 Vdbench distribution: vdbench50401
2 The vdbench workload parameter file names are in the attachment: bw.txt,iops.txt,mix.txt,pre.txt and fstrim_vdb.txt.
3 The lustre client started running the vdbench workload on May 31st at 17:34, and the memory exhaustion issue occurred on June 23rd at 18:12.
Also, please provide details on what vdbench version is being tested, what options are being used when running it, etc.

If you are able to reproduce this, then I would suggest a number of steps to debug the issue:

  • please retest with the latest b2_15 client (2.15.7) to see if the issue can be reproduced
  • retest with the latest master development client (2.16.56.57) to see if the issue can be reproduced
  • run with "lctl set_param debug=+malloc" to trace memory alloc/free operations to see where all of the memory is being allocated. If it is appearing in obd_memory_max then it will be traced with OBD_ALLOC() or related tracing
